title: qPCR quantification of methanogens using general mcrA primers
author: Roey Angel

steps_raw.instruction: %s %s Reagent Final conc. 1 tube (25μl) plate (25μl x 100) PCR H2O 2.85 285 ReadyMix (Sigma) 1x 12.5 1250 MgCl2 (25mM) 3.5 mM 3.5 350 BSA (50μg/μl) 0.8 μg/μl 0.4 40 FITC (1:1000) 0.25 25 mlas-mod (25μM) 0.25 μM 0.25 25 mrcA-rev (25μM) 0.25 μM 0.25 25 Template 5 5 x 100 * Different master mixes vary in concentration of MgCl 2 and the amount should be adjusted accordingly
